quick_skim.title: Breaking Structural Isolation: Scalable Graph Clustering via Community-Aware Sampling and Structural Entropy
quick_skim.abstract: Unsupervised graph clustering is a fundamental technique for uncovering underlying semantic patterns in large-scale networks. Although Graph Contrastive Learning has demonstrated promising performance, existing methods often suffer from the "structural isolation" issue during mini-batch training, making it challenging to capture cohesive community structures that characterize the global topological distribution. To address these challenges, we propose SCISE, a Scalable unsupervised graph Clustering framework that preserves structural Integrity by synergizing community-aware sampling with constrained Structural Entropy. Specifically, we first introduce the Structural Entropy Community Constraint operator (SECC), which optimizes structural information within a constrained solution space to mitigate community fragmentation and enhance partition cohesion. Second, to prevent global information loss during batch training, we design a Community-Aware Sampling Expansion (CSampE) mechanism that incorporates the community context of target nodes into sampling batches, effectively breaking structural barriers and preserving topological integrity. Finally, we devise a Structural Contrastive Learning (StructCL) module that refines edge weights based on intra-batch structural similarity, guiding the encoder to learn representations in a higher-order structural space. Extensive experiments on six mainstream benchmark datasets demonstrate that SCISE significantly outperforms state-of-the-art algorithms, with ablation studies and robustness analyses further validating its effectiveness and reliability for real-world large-scale graphs.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: graph clustering method transferable to graph partitioning for distributed GNN
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 可用于分布式GNN图划分的图聚类方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 可用于分布式GNN图划分的图聚类方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 可用于分布式GNN图划分的图聚类方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes SCISE, a scalable unsupervised graph clustering framework that uses community-aware sampling and structural entropy to overcome structural isolation in mini-batch training, enabling cohesive community detection; offers potential for graph partitioning in distributed GNN training.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有图聚类方法在mini-batch训练中面临结构隔离问题，难以捕捉全局社区结构。本文提出SCISE框架，通过社区感知采样与约束结构熵协同作用，保留图的完整性。该框架引入结构熵社区约束算子，有效提升了大规模网络聚类的可扩展性和准确性。其社区划分思路可迁移至分布式GNN训练中的图划分任务，具有启发价值。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有图聚类方法在mini-batch训练中面临结构隔离问题，难以捕捉全局社区结构。本文提出SCISE框架，通过社区感知采样与约束结构熵协同作用，保留图的完整性。该框架引入结构熵社区约束算子，有效提升了大规模网络聚类的可扩展性和准确性。其社区划分思路可迁移至分布式GNN训练中的图划分任务，具有启发价值。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: graph partitioning strategies for distributed GNN
